scope: local vMLX Python engine source and benchmark repair helper
feature: post-generation JSON repair and schema normalization
covered_failures: schema array field emitted as adjacent string fragments
schema array field emitted as a scalar string

notes: This is repair/validation after generation, not grammar-constrained decoding.
Strict response_format remains able to reject invalid output after repair fails.
Benchmarks can score repaired structured objects while still tracking raw_json_ok and repair_needed.
